note: Tempdoc 622 Layer C. A DIAGNOSTIC trend floor over the most recent N agent sessions — NOT a per-session score and NEVER build-blocking (the kernel has no non-blocking tier; this is the standalone-validator seam, like check-run-renderers / relevance-ratchet). Tolerance absorbs per-session noise. Per tempdoc 277 PHI is a friction diagnostic, not a target; per 622 §6.4 the agents being measured can read this file, so it must never become an optimization gate. The Layer-B hard outcome (merged/built/gate-green) is the anti-gaming guardrail to PHI's process north-star.

phi_score.description: Process Hygiene Index trend mean (0-100). SEED value; recalibrate from N>=30 real sessions once scores.ndjson is OTLP-fed.

tool_failure_rate.description: Mean fraction of tool calls that failed (signals.tool_failure_rate). SEED value.
